tab.avatarComingSoon.message: Avatar (face image + speech to talking-head video) is coming soon. Stay tuned.
tab.avatarComingSoon.description: Tooltip explaining why Avatar tab is disabled

description.motionImage.message: Upload the character reference image. The characters, backgrounds and other elements in the generated video will be based on this image.

description.motionVideo.message: Upload a motion reference video. Character movements in the generated video will follow this video (MP4 / MOV, ≤1 minute, ≤1 GB).

description.motionPrompt.message: Optional. May contain both positive and negative descriptions to refine the result.

description.characterOrientation.message: Choose 'Match video' for complex motions; choose 'Match image' to keep the character orientation aligned with the image and improve camera-movement fidelity.

description.motionMode.message: std prioritizes speed; pro prioritizes quality.

description.keepOriginalSound.message: When ON, retain the original audio from the reference video. When OFF, the output will not contain the original audio.

message.motionMissingInputs.message: Please upload both a character image and a motion reference video.

inspiration.openButton.description: Button to open the Inspiration drawer

inspiration.hint.message: Click a chip to append it to your prompt; click again to remove it.
inspiration.hint.description: Hint shown at top of the Inspiration drawer

inspiration.clearSelected.description: Button to clear all selected chips

inspiration.chip.rotateAround.message: the camera rotates around the subject

inspiration.chip.follow.message: the camera follows the subject moving

inspiration.chip.orbit.message: camera orbits around and pushes in

inspiration.chip.speedSlow.message: the speed of the camera motion is slow

inspiration.chip.speedMedium.message: the speed of the camera motion is medium

inspiration.chip.speedFast.message: the speed of the camera motion is fast

name.type.description: The content type of the Kling video to be generated, such as 'link', 'text', etc.

name.modePro.description: Kling video high quality mode (1080p output)

name.cameraTypeLeftTurnForward.description: Preset move: turn left and move forward

name.cameraTypeRightTurnForward.description: Preset move: turn right and move forward

name.failure.description: The failure status of the task

name.failureReason.description: The reason for the task failure

name.traceId.description: The trace ID of the task

name.createdAt.description: The date and time the Kling video was generated

name.cfgScale.description: The freedom parameter for generating the video (0-1), larger values are closer to the reference

name.generateAudio.description: Whether to generate audio synchronously, supports kling-v3, kling-v3-omni, and kling-v2-6 (pro mode)

name.startImage.description: Form field label: First frame reference image

name.negativePrompt.description: The negative text prompt for generating the video

name.endImage.description: Form field label: Last frame reference image

name.model.description: The model version used to generate the video

name.ratio.description: The aspect ratio used to generate the video

name.mode.description: The mode used to generate the video

name.effect.description: The name of the style parameter used to switch between different versions or styles of the model

name.ingredientsModel.description: The model version used to generate the video

name.klingBot.description: The name of the Kling video generator

description.ingredients.message: Enable this button if you want to upload multiple images to create your video.

description.imageUrl.message: In multi-image video creation tasks, multiple images must be uploaded.

description.prompt.message: The prompt for generating the Kling video

description.negativePrompt.message: Negative text prompt, optional, must not exceed 200 characters

description.uploadStartImage.message: Upload the first frame image as a reference for generation; the final video will reference the first frame.
description.uploadStartImage.description: Description for the upload reference parameter

description.uploadEndImage.message: Upload the last frame image as a reference for generation; the final video will reference the last frame.
description.uploadEndImage.description: Description for the upload reference parameter

description.cfgScale.message: The freedom level for generating the video, optional [0,1]. Larger values indicate stronger relevance.
description.cfgScale.description: Description for the upload reference parameter

description.mode.message: std is faster, pro has higher quality; 4K is only supported by v3 / v3-Omni and is not compatible with camera control.

description.duration.message: Standard models support only 5 / 10 seconds; v3 / v3-Omni support 3 / 5 / 8 / 10 / 12 / 15 seconds.

description.durationV3Only.description: Reason a duration option is disabled

description.generateAudio.message: Generate audio together with the video. Only kling-v3 / kling-v3-omni / kling-v2-6 (pro mode) support this.

description.generateAudioUnsupported.message: The current model does not support synchronized audio. Switch to kling-v3 / kling-v3-omni or kling-v2-6 (pro mode) to enable.

description.cameraControl.message: Drive the camera direction. Choose 'Custom' to fine-tune 6 axes; each accepts values in [-1, 1].

description.cameraControlDisabled4k.message: Camera control is unavailable in 4K mode. Switch to std / pro to enable.

status.pending.description: The pending status of the task

status.processing.description: The processing status of the task

placeholder.select.description: Placeholder text in the selection field

placeholder.prompt.message: Enter the prompt for the video style, e.g., moving
placeholder.prompt.description: Placeholder text in the prompt field

placeholder.negativePrompt.message: Enter the negative prompt for the video style, up to 200 characters
placeholder.negativePrompt.description: Placeholder text in the negative prompt field

button.precise.description: Button text for generating a Kling video

button.creative.description: Button text for generating a Kling video

button.generate.description: Button text for generating a Kling video

button.extend.description: Button text for extending the video

button.download.description: Button text for downloading the video

button.uploadImageUrl.description: Button text for uploading an image (simplified to 'Upload', do not use 'Upload Image')

button.uploadVideoUrl.description: Button text for uploading a video

button.uploadReferences.description: Button text allowing users to upload references

message.uploadReferencesExceed.message: You can upload a maximum of 1 image
message.uploadReferencesExceed.description: Error message when the number of uploaded images exceeds the limit

message.uploadReferencesSuccess.description: Success message when an image is uploaded successfully

message.uploadReferencesError.message: Image upload failed, please try again later
message.uploadReferencesError.description: Error message when image upload fails

message.startingTask.description: Message when the drawing task starts

message.startTaskSuccess.description: Success message when the task is successfully started

message.startTaskFailed.message: Failed to initiate task, please contact the administrator
message.startTaskFailed.description: Error message when starting the drawing task fails

message.usedUp.message: Your credits are exhausted, please purchase more credits to continue
message.usedUp.description: Message when credits are used up

message.generating.description: Message when the image is being generated

message.downloadVideo.description: Message when the image is being generated

message.extendVideo.description: Message when the image is being generated

message.uploadVideoExceed.message: The number of uploaded first frame images exceeds the limit
message.uploadVideoExceed.description: Error message when the number of uploaded first frame images exceeds the limit

message.uploadVideoSizeExceed.description: Error message when the uploaded file size exceeds 10MB!

message.uploadVideoTypeFailed.message: Uploaded file must be in MP4 format!
message.uploadVideoTypeFailed.description: Error message when the uploaded file is not in MP4 format!

message.uploadStartImageExceed.message: The number of uploaded first frame images exceeds the limit
message.uploadStartImageExceed.description: Error message when the number of uploaded first frame images exceeds the limit

message.uploadEndImageExceed.message: The number of uploaded last frame images exceeds the limit
message.uploadEndImageExceed.description: Error message when the number of uploaded last frame images exceeds the limit

message.uploadStartImageError.message: Failed to upload first frame image
message.uploadStartImageError.description: Error message when uploading the first frame image fails

message.uploadVideoError.description: Error message when uploading the first frame image fails

message.uploadEndImageError.message: Failed to upload last frame image
message.uploadEndImageError.description: Error message when uploading the last frame image fails

message.uploadDocumentsError.description: Error message when uploading a document fails

message.noOperations.description: Message when there are no available operations

message.noTasks.message: No historical tasks, please click on the left to generate a video
message.noTasks.description: Message when there are no tasks
